When given a question about the data, you will parse the table, reason through the attributes, and select the correct answer from the provided multiple-choice options. Provide only the letter of the correct choice (e.g., A) as your response.

Choose only the correct letter (A, B, C, etc.) from the multiple-choice options and output it without any additional text.
